doc_name: Serious FDA Recall Issued for Edwards Lifesciences Cardiovascular Balloons

chunks.doc_name: Serious FDA Recall Issued for Edwards Lifesciences Cardiovascular Balloons
chunks.text: # Serious FDA Recall Issued for Edwards Lifesciences Cardiovascular Balloons ## Xtalks 4620 subscribers ### Description 365 views Posted: 10 Jul 2019 Register for our free featured webinar here: https://bit.ly/2KGbpUI Read more on this story here: https://bit.ly/2XX075s American medical device company Edwards Lifesciences is recalling 757 cardiovascular balloons in the wake of three deaths and 22 complaints reported to the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA). For more news stories, visit: https://bit.ly/2YQhQJh Receive weekly news and webinar updates right in your inbox: https://xtalks.com/register/ Listen live and interact with featured speakers on our upcoming Life Science webinars: https://bit.ly/2YRzAV0 ### Transcript: here's the latest on xtalks.com american medical device company Edwards Lifesciences is recalling 757 cardiovascular balloons in the wake of three deaths and 22 complaints reported to the FDA hello I'm Candace Tang life sciences journalist and webinar moderator for xtalks.com and welcome to this edition of xtalks vitals our featured webinar for this episode is using cognition to guide decisions on the safety and tolerability of drugs and clinical development click the link in the description below to register for this free webinar and don't forget to hit the subscribe button on the bottom right corner of this video so you can always see up to date on the latest xtalks vitals episodes to perform heart surgery surgeons need to stop the heart from beating while ensuring the patient stays alive to do so they use an intra-aortic occlusion device which blocks off the aorta with an inflated balloon but if the balloon bursts the patient can suffer serious health consequences like brain damage and death about 9 lots of the intra clued intra-aortic occlusion device were recalled as a result of balloon rupturing which compromises the ability of the device to safely block the aorta in many cases the surgeons were able to rescue the ruptured balloon and complete the surgery safely but at least two patient deaths could be related to the ruptured blue Edwards Lifesciences is currently investigating the cause of the defect but has advised surgeons to stop using these devices immediately this latest recall adds to the company's growing list of faulty cardiovascular medical devices since the beginning of 2019 three other Edwards or life sciences devices have been recalled including a balloon intended to enlarge the hearts atria that couldn't deflate properly and an incorrectly assembled device that led to inaccurate measurements of blood pressure the company had issued an notice two users of intra clued back in me morning of the devices defects in response to growing safety concerns over medical devices the FDA plans to make their adverse event reporting procedures stricter and more transparent subscribe to the xtalks youtube channel by clicking the subscribe button below and visit xtalks.com for more information on this story in our featured life science webinar for this episode using cognition to guide decisions on the safety and tolerability of drugs and clinical developments click the link in the description below to register for this free webinar [Music] [Music]
